criteria.description: Concurrent edge appends to different source fileIDs never block each other because each writes to its own per-node log rather than a shared array.
criteria.planned_check: TestPerNodeEdgeLog: many goroutines, each targeting a distinct fileID, appending concurrently under -race; assert correctness of per-node contents plus a soft timing-based non-blocking proxy check (concurrent wall time << serial-equivalent time).

criteria.description: Each fileID writes to its own per-node log (not a shared array).
criteria.planned_check: TestPerNodeEdgeLogBasic: append to 2-3 distinct fileIDs, assert on-disk directory-per-fileID layout and zero cross-contamination when reading each node's log back independently.
Exact command run during self-consistency step with -timeout, output captured.

criteria.description: gofmt/go vet/go build clean; -race on concurrency-relevant test; explicit -timeout on every go test invocation.
criteria.planned_check: gofmt -l engine/graph, go vet ./..., go build ./..., go test ./engine/graph/... -race -timeout 120s
